summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ProntoTicketLive homepage UI. All core functionality working correctly with excellent visual design, responsive behavior, and proper brand implementation.

ui_bugs.issue: Buy button hover effect not fully working - opacity remains 0 on hover instead of 1
Card transform hover effect not applying - no translate-y animation visible

passed_tests: Header sticky behavior with glassmorphism effect
Hero section with background image and watermark logo
Search bar with 3 input fields (event, city, venue)
Featured Events section with 3 event cards
Upcoming Events section with 8 event cards in grid
Event cards display all required information
Footer with all sections (links, policies, contact, social media)
Responsive design across desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), mobile (390x844)
Typography implementation (Outfit for headings, Inter for body)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor hover effect issues only
